mapper.select:
SELECT URKEY , URNM , URGRKEY , CTKEY , OWKEYM AS OWKEY FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE DELYN = 'N'
AND URKEY = #{urkey}
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT 'true' FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND URKEY = #{urkey}), 'false')
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM TADMIN_MST_UR WHERE DELYN = 'Y' AND UPDATEURKEY = 'SAMPLE_TEST'
